/usr/bin/ar qc libimgformatlib.a CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/ewf_stream.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4_stream.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4_container_stream.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff_stream.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/compatibility.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/data_store.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/lexicon.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/rdf.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/zip.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/aff4_directory.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/aff4_file.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/aff4_map.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/aff4_symstream.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/aff4_image.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/aff4_init.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/volume_group.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/libaff4.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/tclap_parsers.cc.o CMakeFiles/imgformatlib.dir/imgformatlib/aff4/aff4_hash.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libimgformatlib.a
